TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Idriss Déby ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 6, Idriss Déby, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1952) mrhuw Chad ta' misuw hya' ga Idriss Déby, aring ryax tay 2 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 1990 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: i*ris~ɕs~ɕ **βj rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, i*ris~ɕs~ɕ **βj, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ʦ~ʨħa* taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa i*ris~ɕs~ɕ **βj, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: Idriss Déby ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 6, Idriss Déby, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1952) mrhuw Chad ta' misuw hya' ga Idriss Déby, aring ryax tay 2 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 1990 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: i*ris~ɕs~ɕ **βj rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, i*ris~ɕs~ɕ **βj, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ʦ~ʨħa* taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa i*ris~ɕs~ɕ **βj, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
